title: Are Aliens Taking Advantage Of Our PSYCHOLOGY?
summary: This brief interview segment discusses the psychological aspects of potential alien contact, exploring the theory that UFO phenomena may be using psychological control systems similar to variable reinforcement schedules to influence human behavior and perception.

key_claims.claim: An alien civilization wanting to open a parallel timeline would use tongue-in-cheek or strange methods like dropping unusual objects
Control systems theory suggests that variable reinforcement (not rewarding every instance) is more effective for lasting behavioral change than constant reinforcement
Constant reinforcement produces fast learning but people revert to previous behavior, while variable reinforcement produces more lasting change
